summary:
GLOBAL SECURITY AND INFRASTRUCTURE PRAYERS: Brandon reflects on the lack of terrorist attacks during the Easter and Passover weekend, specifically noting that anticipated threats did not materialize globally. He outlines an ongoing intercession mission focusing on protecting vital American infrastructure, including the Boston Marathon, art festivals, oil refineries in Tuttle and Houston, gas plants, dams, power stations, and the national water supply.

POLITICAL LEADERSHIP AND SPIRITUAL WARFARE: Brandon discusses President Donald Trump, observing that he has faced significant pressure from the media, the far-left, and Agenda 2030, leading to a recent rhetorical blunder involving the mention of Allah. Brandon describes having a spiritual vision of a demonic entity in the Oval Office clouding Trump's mind. He intercedes for Trump's protection, wisdom, and electoral success, asking for divine intervention to shield his family and secure victories in upcoming elections while maintaining conservative control of the House and Senate.

GEOPOLITICAL SHIFTS AND END TIMES PROPHECY: Brandon shares intense prophetic visions regarding international relations, characterizing French President Emmanuel Macron as a forerunner to the Antichrist with a tyrannical anointing. He foresees massive global economic shifts, warning of a potential global depression, a beast system, and oil prices soaring to high levels. In his visions, Iran faces severe infrastructure and economic crippling, while Iraq emerges as a wealthy territory filled with oil derricks, luxury vehicles, and massive buildings. He also predicts Saudi Arabia's Crown Prince and Jared Kushner will spearhead a two-state solution in Israel.

GLOBAL WEALTH AND NATIONAL TRANSFORMATIONS: Brandon details further visions concerning various nations, predicting massive oil and wealth extraction in Venezuela and Colombia. He sees Greenland becoming a major hub for heavy metal and cobalt mining, and Russia successfully acquiring territory in Ukraine. He describes a future Cuba transformed into a highly prosperous tourist destination filled with cruise ships, casinos, and new manufacturing industries. Additionally, he envisions a sudden political shift in the United States, specifically prophesying a surprising conservative political wave in California that will uncover electoral fraud, alongside Minnesota shifting its political alignment.

DIVINE HEALING AND SYMBOLIC VISIONS: Brandon shares testimonies of miraculous physical healing, recounting the story of Billy Burke being cured of terminal cancer through Kathryn Kuhlman, and applies this faith to his own daughter Megan's ongoing victory over autism. He strictly rejects accepting illness, referring to it as an unwanted delivery from the devil. He also recounts a detailed, symbolic vision of Trump's children facing a destructive tornado in New York City. In this vision, Donald Jr. sustains burning facial wounds, but the storm is calmed. The vision culminates with the construction of a massive, technologically advanced skyscraper featuring AI LED screens and walking digital coins, symbolizing future exponential wealth and a new private jet for the family.

CLIMATE CONTROL AND WEATHER PETITIONS: Brandon exercises spiritual authority over weather patterns, specifically commanding an end to severe droughts across the United States. He calls for low-pressure systems and the jet stream to bring significant rainfall to Texas, Oklahoma, Missouri, Arkansas, California, Nevada, Arizona, Utah, Colorado, Wyoming, and Montana to restore the land.
rawData: [April 06, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/QsNuNKQL80E]-[Father, I just plead the blood of Jesus over us. I thank you, Father, and anoint my head with oil. I thank you, Lord, over this atmosphere of this room. Father, I plead the blood of Jesus over us. We thank you, Lord, for your angels in the name of Jesus. I have to turn my phone off. You want to ring-a-ding in a prayer? Holy Spirit, I invite you. Thank you, Lord. You become so real to the people tonight. We yield to the anointing of the Holy Spirit. Father, I yield to the anointing of the watcher and the anointing of the prophetic. We thank you, Father. If you have something to say, you say it. Good evening, everybody. Thank you for joining us again tonight, and happy Resurrection evening. Isn't that wonderful? I pray you all had a good service today. From what I have seen, there has been nothing on the news of any kind of ISIS or terrorist attack from around the world, and I just want to give God glory for every bit of it. Isn't Jesus wonderful? They threatened and said so much, even after what the Lord warned us and we prayed and came together. I told Braden that even if 10% of those watching—we had over 43,000 plus praying with us—at just the 10% mark were the real true prayer warriors, the ones with true grit who are ready to take their authority and communion and believe that God is able to do what he said he would do. It is exciting to see what I believe the enemy was going to try to do to kill, steal, and destroy over Passover, Good Friday, and Resurrection Sunday. We didn't hear anything across the world, not even in Nigeria. Isn't Jesus wonderful? Think about that: a coliseum full of real intercessors agreeing and believing God. Shouldn't we see that no weapon formed against us would prosper? Whenever the enemy says he is going to destroy, we say, 'Oh, no, you're not. We have power and authority over you.' Not our churches, not our houses, not our places of worship. We will not have that. It's exciting to see that as we cross over into Monday. Now our mission: we are praying for the Boston Marathon, art festivals, our oil wells, gas plants, oil refineries—including the ones in Tuttle and Houston—dams, power plants, and substations. We are praying against any attack on our water infrastructure. Last video, I didn't pray much; we just talked a little bit because I got a late start and I wanted everyone to go to church. But my main focus tonight is President Trump. He's having a rough day. The media is saying he was in the hospital, and it went viral. There is so much fake news coming against him today. Then he committed a blunder, in my opinion. Braden blacked out the cuss words, but I was disappointed in what he said. That comes from the pressure of all hell coming against him concerning our nation, Agenda 2030, and the far-left wingnuts. He makes statements like this out of pressure. I don't know if he knows who Allah is. I'll give him the benefit of the doubt. But sir, that is not Jehovah Jireh. That is Allah, that's Muhammad, that is the Muslim faith. We are not giving praise to Allah on Easter. I don't know what he was thinking. I told you I saw a demonic spirit in the Oval Office, hiding from the watchers and poking at his head until a fog came over his mind. I saw his eyes shielded with what looked like cataracts in the spirit. The Lord told me to pray for President Trump to get him across the finish line concerning the midterms. Now, when I heard Emmanuel Macron and other European leaders saying he made his bed and should lie in it concerning Iran, and he's telling them to protect the strait, they say they won't get involved. Even France said they aren't getting involved. And partially, when you don't want to be involved in a major war, I understand; but if they saw what we see in the spirit regarding weapons of mass destruction, they would be helping. Many of them have reprobate minds, from Macron on down. I believe Emmanuel Macron is the Ishmael to the Isaac of what is about to happen with the Antichrist—he is the forerunner. In the days ahead, he will come out as a tyrant in Europe and try to take freedoms away in France and influence England, Italy, and Germany. I saw a Hitler-type anointing trying to wrap around him. I also saw Jared acting as a forerunner, helping with peace agreements to get things ready for the Antichrist to step on the scene. All I know is that in Iran and Israel, there has been such an acceleration going into 2026. What does the rest of this year look like? If the Strait doesn't get opened up, they're calling for a global depression. People on X are talking about oil prices hitting $150 a barrel. Is this the beginning of the beast system? I feel in my spirit that something major is about to happen. When I talk to elders who have been in ministry for years, they all say it looks like Jesus is getting ready to come back. What is the domino that pushes this over? A global depression, a plague, or a major world war? We don't hear much about Ukraine anymore; it's all about Iran now. I'm disappointed that Facebook attacked us today. They told me I'm no longer allowed to post because they don't want my content on their platform. They didn't take the whole page down, but I am blocked from posting new content. I knew great censorship was coming. If you want to find us, we are on X, YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok. However, TikTok already gave me two strikes, so I have to walk on eggshells there. It's disappointing when you work hard for a platform and they ban you. We are praying for favor, but if we must move on, we will focus on X. Elon Musk isn't an idiot so far. The Lord told me great censorship would come toward the summer as they start banning people and their First Amendment rights. False. All this stuff they say, when they say this is not real news or fake news, they're trying to tell you it's fake when you know it's real. But it is what it is. I just wanted to let you all know what was going on with Facebook because people are asking, 'Why aren't you posting anything?' Well, they told me I couldn't. At least they didn't pull the whole site down. I'm praying for favor. I don't like Zuckerberg anyway. He's going to be hiding in a hole soon, in a bunker, looking out with his big curly head. I told you he's the Antichrist's puppet. I believe that with all my heart—it's my opinion, but we'll see what happens. I'm using their platform to reach people for Jesus, so it's just disappointing when you have 70,000 followers and it just goes. But to God be the glory. We'll just keep doing this until the Lord tells me otherwise. I believe I'm on YouTube until the Lord has us praying elsewhere. I always have a backup plan to my backup plan. When I talked about the theater in Branson last night, that's a backup plan to the backup plan. God said, 'I've called you to say the hard things that nobody else has the guts to say, Brandon.' A lot of people will shy away, but I will say whatever He tells me to say, even unto death. When He visited me at my house and looked at me face to face, He asked, 'Are you willing to die for the cause of Christ?' I said, 'Lord, I would. As for me and my house, we serve You.' I know that's not always an easy thing to say, but I'm the one standing up here telling you all what's coming. While others want to give you sugarcoated prophetic words that are just fruity flakes, I'm trying to tell you a shaking's coming to awaken. So far, we're seeing it. It had nothing to do with Brandon Biggs, but it's been a very interesting couple of months. 2026, the year of 1 Corinthians 5:5, has been spent in that cleft of the rock, watching the shakings of the nations. As we go into summer, we have just begun to see the birthing pains doubling and increasing. So I just want to encourage people: don't give up and don't get weary in well-doing. When you are striking a nerve with the devil—like when I was telling my friend some things and after it was over, Slewfoot tried to show up yelling in my garage again—you know you've struck a nerve. The demonic realm is real, but we have power and authority over it. You've got to take your communion and anoint your head with oil, and believe that your cup runneth over. Last night, we brought 62 people to Jesus Christ within an hour and a half. It is amazing to see people come to the saving knowledge of Jesus in the last couple of months. I've rambled enough. We're about to see something major. Thousands worshipped in Times Square on Easter Sunday. That's pretty cool. I bet that Mamdani is rolling over in his office up there. He's like, 'No, it's about Allah.' He's up there wanting to play the call to prayer, but his false god is going down. I'm so tired of being politically correct. People need to repent or they're going to burn in hell. It's time for the church to get a backbone and stop being limp-wristed or we're going to lose the land. You can't even say anything on Facebook without violating community guidelines. They won't tell you what you said wrong because they don't want a lawsuit, but they don't like the name of Jesus because it torments the devil inside them when they're licking crystals or snorting cocaine. It's time for the violent to take it by force and tell people to repent because Jesus is coming. If we all stand together and preach the gospel, repentance, and holiness, think of what we will see. Thank God for that pastor in Times Square. Jesus suffered and died for every one of us to have a victorious life. It's time to come home. Gilmore said 9,000 people were born again in Cuba and 42,000 came to the meeting. 97 pastors came to get refired up and spread the gospel through the nations. Father, we thank You for the platform of YouTube, X, and even Facebook. We submit ourselves unto God. We are not moved by what we see or feel, but by what the Word of God says. We will stand on the wall yelling that Jesus Christ is coming. We are fully persuaded that what God has promised, He is able also to perform. Jesus, we believe You're a healer and a prosperer. You will take care of us financially. For You said 30, 60, and 100-fold if we sow seed into good ground. We believe everyone in here tonight is going to be debt-free. We lay hold to the finances to supply for the kingdom. I say, 'Not yet' to the shaking—the church needs supplies to bring forth the harvest. Supply all their needs, Lord. We are the head and not the tail. When we lay hands on the sick, they will recover. I thank You that we will see autistic children become completely, radically renewed and set free. And they'll see what Jesus did for him. When I hear my friend Billy Burke talk about how he had stage four cancer and he couldn't even see out of one eye because he had double vision—he was on the verge of death. The doctors said, "You're going to die in just a couple of days." He was 11 or 12 years old, I believe, on the verge of death. The doctors had to make the grandmother sign the papers for Billy, and she took him to a Kathryn Kuhlman meeting. He sat up in the balcony, just waiting there, and Kathryn turned around and said, "You get down here!" By the Spirit of God, he didn't even want to go. They had to drag him down there. The ushers had to grab hold of him and pull him down there, dying of cancer. When she laid hands on him, she asked, "Do you believe? Do you believe?" Finally, when Jesus touched him and knocked four rows of people out in the Holy Ghost, he laid and shook underneath the power of God. From that moment forward, he was completely healed by Jesus. By Jesus' stripes, Jesus touched Billy. It was awesome to hear. I hear that testimony all the time, and I think about it. That's the same thing that has happened to my Megan. Do you believe? Do you believe? She's not overcoming cancer, but she is overcoming autism. I believe that she will have her day of sitting right here and telling you about the goodness of God and what's happened to her body. Her mind was completely touched and renewed. She can talk clearly. I believe it; I'm fully persuaded. I look for it every day. It's coming. It's here. She's already healed, I know, but we're going to see the manifestation, and she's going to sit right here. She's going to tell you about what God did for her and what she experienced. I believe there are many of you that have the same kind of testimony out there, that you're believing for your child or for your miracle. You say, "Well, the doctor tells me I only have a couple of days to live, Brandon. I'm that person." And I say, I believe Jesus is a healer. I believe Jesus is a rewarder of those that diligently seek Him. I believe that it's your day, your expiration date for sickness, as we see throughout this day that Jesus took it all on the cross. He was whipped to the point of being unrecognizable. Flesh was hanging off His bones. He suffered greatly for you to walk in victory over sickness. By His stripes, we are healed. That's why we take this. This isn't a religious act; this is in remembrance of what He did for us. Jesus took it all for you. I'm not going to allow the devil to put on me what Jesus took. I'm not taking his 'poo poo package.' He takes the FedEx 'poo poo package' and he puts it at your door to see if you accept it. I say, "I'm not accepting it. I am not allowing autism to stay on my child anymore. I am not allowing my life to keep being this way." Why? Because Jesus paid the price for you to walk in victory over it. It wasn't just for salvation; Jesus paid the price for you to be healed. Jesus paid the price for you to be prosperous. He became poor that you might be rich. You don't have to be poor anymore. You don't have to be broke, busted, and disgusted, down and out, thinking, "How am I going to get through this life anymore?" Jesus paid the price for your mental torment. He was wounded for our transgressions, He was bruised for our iniquities, the chastisement of our peace was upon Him, and with His stripes, we are healed. He gives you His peace. My peace I give unto you. I believe it's time for us to have that peace, so we walk around and people wonder, "Why are you so at ease all the time?" Because He gave me peace. My peace I leave with you; my peace I give unto you. I receive peace, joy, and His patience tonight. Thank You, Lord. By faith, I receive more. I need more patience sometimes with these people. Father, I thank You for patience, kindness, goodness, and self-control. When it comes to eating, I have self-control. My Father gives it to me. I yield to self-control, joy, and longsuffering. I yield, Father, to everything the fruits of the Spirit say I can have. Father, tonight we take this body right now in Jesus' name, and we give You glory, honor, and praise for what You did 2,000-plus years ago. Lord Jesus, You became the ultimate sacrifice for us. We plead the blood. We make much of the blood. The blood makes much of us. We apply the blood; it never loses its power. I thank You, Father, that the blood covers my mind. I hear You uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. I apply the blood of Jesus over us. I thank You, Lord, for the blood and that it never loses its power. I thank You, Lord, that Great is Your faithfulness to us. I put angels all around this room, Father. If there's anything You want to show us tonight in prayer, we yield to it. We yield to the anointing of the prophetic and the anointing of the watcher. We thank You, Lord, that You show us that which is to come. We pray, Father, that we are always ahead of the storm. We know what the devil is planning before he even thinks he's going to plan it, because God knows the devil's plan before he even plans it. That's why He tells us what he is going to do, so you're going to stop him. Hit him in the head like the whack-a-mole, Brandon. Stop him before it happens. I have given you power and authority to tread on serpents and scorpions, and nothing shall by any means hurt you. When you know God knows the plans of the enemy before they even exist, we've got the victory. But we've got to pray. That's why He gives us people that can see, and we're so thankful that we see before they even have a plan to do it—a year in advance, sometimes more. I'll tell you this: I was going through a drive-thru, and I was going to tell you this yesterday. I always talk about seeing—how it's ankle-deep, waist-deep, or over the head—and it's like fighting to stay in it. Have you ever jumped off a cliff or a boat with a life jacket on? You jump in that water and instantaneously, that life jacket pulls you up. If you fight against it, you can stay submerged for a bit, but to remain underneath takes effort. The Lord showed me it was like a person with a life jacket on. The natural realm is always trying to pull you out of the Spirit and out of being a seer. That's why I get so tired—unless you're conditioning yourself, you're fighting against the flesh to stay in that realm of the Spirit. The moment you go as deep as you can, your life jacket automatically pulls you out. When I went to heaven, I could feel it; I was there and I didn't want to leave, but I could feel it pulling and sucking me out. When you're only ankle-deep, you see so much, and when you're waist-deep, you see more. But when you go to the bottom of that pool, I'm able to see a lot more of what the Lord wants me to see. It takes dying to self and making your flesh submit to go deeper. Automatically, the natural realm tries to pull you out. That's why when we get our glorified bodies, it's going to be beautiful. Sometimes it's like having a scuba tank on without that life jacket, and you're down there swimming around for a bit. It's only every once in a while that He lets that happen to that extent. It always feels like the flesh is trying to pull you out. Then I stop and sing praises, and you worship Him and give Him glory, and it keeps you in that deeper water. We don't see to attract glory to ourselves; it's always about giving God glory. He can use anybody. As long as you keep the main thing the main thing and keep yourself humble, saying, "You can use whoever You want to." He could use Sister Clipboard tonight, even if we don't think she deserves it. Who are you to say He can't? When you stay in that place of always giving Him glory and keeping your eyes on Him through prayer and fasting, I've learned to develop the relationship to the point where it's easier to get in the river. It used to take me hours, but now I jump in the river a lot faster. But that life jacket—the flesh—tries to keep you out. It's always fighting your thoughts, insecurities, and what people think. You have to say, "Shut up, flesh! I'm not listening to you. I am the righteousness of God in Christ Jesus. As He is, so am I in this world." I am fully submerged in His love tonight. As long as you keep worshiping Him, you'll stay in that deeper water. I was telling Diana about the watcher anointing—when that cloak comes on, the heavier it is, the more you're able to see. There are definitely levels: ankle-deep, waist-deep, and over the head. There is a big difference between just splashing around and having the ability to see deeper things. So, I hope that blessed you. Father, I just thank You for tonight. We lift up President Trump before You. Obviously, he had a rough day. We don't excuse his behavior or his use of profanity; I know he's smarter than that. But Father, his behavior is not pleasing, and I'm praying for him instead of judging him. I don't understand that. Maybe it was just ignorance. But Father, I thank you, Lord, that you've got the heart, that you've got him in your hand. And Father, I thank you that you have patience with him regardless of whatever was going on with all this pressure. I don't know how many people could handle what he's been through even in the last eight years. But I ask you, Father, right now to give him peace wherever he's at in the White House and his house in Florida—if his marriage is doing okay, if his grandkids are acting out—I don't know. But I know, Father, that with all the pressure that he has from the media and the Democrats, and then foreign nations and Iran and the soldiers, you can crack under pressure. And Father, that's where we come in as believing believers. We just lift him up before you. I thank you, God, that you have mercy. We don't praise Allah, Father. We praise you. We give Jesus all the glory, honor, and praise on this day. And Father, I know that could have been a grieving, but Father, we ask you to forgive him. He knows not what he did. He messed up. But Father, I pray for a covering around President Trump tonight. That you give him wisdom, that he takes no counsel from the ungodly, and Father, that you give him that supernatural peace that passes all understanding right now as he's probably getting ready to go to bed. I ask you, Father, to give him wisdom this week and how he handles Iran and how he handles the Strait. Father, this is a chess match and this thing is trying to sink his presidency, but we know you called him to do this to liberate the people of Iran from the Ayatollah, and now we undergird him for his obedience in getting rid of tyrant people that were brutally murdering Christians, treating women like trash, and doing god-awful things. We thank you, Lord, that those people are no longer in power. And it's because of people like President Trump that helped set those people free. Now, God, Father, I thank you that this war is going to come to an end, that peace is over the Middle East and that the oil and all that you showed me concerning 'drill, baby, drill' that America will be financially stable and that this will turn around; what the devil meant for bad, God, we're going to turn it around for good. We thank you, Lord, that he doesn't act hastily concerning Iran and how to handle these situations, that he strategically processes and knows exactly what we need to do, and he'll see it in foresight, being able to see ahead of time on how to handle this so that we don't mess up. I thank you, Father, for protecting the troops, the pilots that got away today, that they didn't lose their lives, and that you protected the one even with a broken ankle. I thank you, Father, that your hands were on our troops today. I thank you, Father, that no weapon formed against our troops would prosper on the Abraham Lincoln, on the George W. Bush, and on all the bases around; Father, that you protect every single serviceman and woman. Father, they're not in harm's way. The rockets can fall in, but it will not nigh their dwelling. I thank you. I'm so grateful, Father, for the eyes of the watcher. Even whenever we have hard days, Father, you're so merciful. Even by your grace—it's not that we deserve it—but it's all by your mercy and your grace that you show us anything. Your sister doesn't know we're live, hun. She's yelling my name in there. What was interesting about what I just saw was like an explosion of a vision; I was able to see a lot very quickly and it just flooded me. So, this is what we're going to go with. Father, we pray for his kids. We pray over Don Jr. right now. Father, I lift up Don Jr. before you in the name of Jesus. We thank you that his life is protected. Every plot, every plan, every pursuit of any kind of attack against his life is thwarted in Jesus' name. We lift up Don Jr., we lift up Eric, we lift up Barron, we lift up Tiffany, and we lift up Ivanka and Kai. We plead the blood of Jesus over them in the name of Jesus. We pray over his children. We pray over Don. Oh Father, even the person who's going to replace Pam Bondi. You think there's so much there. I'm in New York City, all around Trump Tower. I'm looking right at Trump Tower. I'm going down the street and I'm praying over Don Jr. I pray over his family that every plot, every plan, every pursuit, every planned assassination, or every planned attack of murder—whatever it may be—Father, your hand is around and about the children. I thank you, Father, that the angels of the Lord are around and about the children. I see a storm coming around him. I see a storm that looks like a tornado. And this tornado was sucking around and about him going down the street of New York. And it looks like a tornado that looks similar to a cartoon. This is a major tornado. And the tornado is going in; it's blowing his hair, his jacket, his tie, and his garments on his body. And I see this tornado come right up to his feet and it stops. Eric is over here, and Don is over here. The storm is there, but both are up steps. Eric, his tie is just going sideways. He looks frantic as he's reaching out for his brother. I see the wind is so close to him that it's actually removing the flesh on his face, pulling it back so that you see almost the skull and the innards. But as I see it, I see Eric reaching out to him, trying to grab him out of harm's way. But his tie is striped and it's going up around his neck, pulling out toward the side, and he's frantic because even his hair is being moved. I see Trump Tower in the background and I see the steps, and the storm is getting smaller now. It went from great big to smaller and smaller, to the point where he could hold it in his hand. And I see the Lord's face. Lord, you're not in the tornado. Jesus took care of the storm. Jesus's face was in the storm as it shrunk. I could see his cheeks, and all of a sudden that storm became nothing. It was like the size of a micro-car. I see his face. I see Eric and Don. I see the building, but I see coins that have white sneakers on that are walking. They have white gloves on and white shoes on with eyes, and the coins are walking like M&M characters behind the boys. They're on Trump. Eric is making the coins walk in a straight line ahead of him. They're all on the steps where his brother looks wounded. The wounds on his face from that storm are on fire. They look like they're burning from the inside out. Beside the tower, I see a new tower that's really tall, like a skyscraper. I see Trump on this, but it has a screen that looks like an LED screen similar to downtown Times Square on those buildings. It's in a V that goes up, and there's actually this screen on the side of this building that's glass, playing a movie clip like a commercial or some kind of advertisement, similar to big golden letters that say Trump. But Trump is not at the bottom base; it's up at the top. I see a movie screen on this building that looks like LED lights; it's like AI with little men dancing. These little coins are walking to the building that's built as a brand-new huge structure. And there is an LED screen that looks like AI that's in a pyramid shape. I see Barron coming alongside this and he's walking up the steps to this building. Barron has a tuxedo on with tails, like the nice ones, and he has black patent leather shoes on. It looks like a wedding outfit. And he's walking up to the building with the LED and the coins bouncing back and forth to go in there. This building will be much bigger than even the building that they're in right now; this building will double what is on them right now. As I see this building grow taller and taller, the taller it goes, the skinnier it is at the top. But as it goes up, the base is getting thicker at the bottom. I see the building that has Trump at the bottom; it's becoming smaller as this one grows taller, and Barron's in it—Barron, Eric, and Don. But Don is wounded on the steps with his face. There's fire on him and it looks like he's burning from the inside out. He doesn't look right. He has holes and he's burning. His hands and his clothes are burning. He looks like sulfur. We pray for Don Jr. We pray for Don Jr.'s skin. We pray for his face. Father, I thank you, Lord. The holes are filled. There are five coins. Now all through that building is digital writing. It looks like the Matrix and all of it's moving and the whole building is lit up. The glass front became green letters and numbers; the whole building is moving. I see a brand-new jet, beautiful. On the side, I see paint. That old Trump jet is about to become a new jet. And it's no longer a great big one; it's a fast one that looks like a Citation X, a lot faster than that big one they have. I see Maliki. I see oil wells. I see great oil derricks like they had back with Texas, like the Houston Oilers. The oil is springing forth out of the top of these oil derricks. They're in Iraq. As you see Iran crumble, watch Iraq. I see oil. A second plan across the land. A double plan across the land. You'll see it in the news as Iran is crippled back to the Stone Ages and the Prince of Persia lets go of Iraq. You'll see a crippling of Iran's infrastructure, their finances, their oil, and the Strait. But watch Iraq. I see a fountain of oil coming up out of these derricks. And I see oil coming up out of Iraq and in Venezuela. I see great wealth and oil coming out of Venezuela. I see more oil. I see financial coming up out of South America. I see a shaking coming to Colombia. There's oil in Colombia on the border there, and I see oil coming up out of it. I see oil and gold. I see the banker.
